title: The future of software engineering, tokenmaxxing and AI in higher education
summary: IBM's Mixture of Experts podcast panel from New York Tech Week discusses how software engineering roles are changing due to AI, explores tokenmaxxing as companies exhaust AI budgets rapidly, covers NVIDIA's RTX Spark superchip enabling 120-billion-parameter models on personal PCs, and examines challenges universities face integrating AI literacy into curricula as students enter transformed workplaces.
